name: Video - Advanced Product Management in POS
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this video we show you how to manage your products within a sale in POS, including resorting the order of the products on the sale, and viewing detailed product information (image, inventory in other Outlets etc)."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "iframe", "url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/79161026?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "frameAttributes": {"width": "700", "height": "400"}, "embedData": {"url": "https://player.vimeo.com/video/79161026?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0", "embedType": "iframe", "name": "", "width": "700", "height": "400"}}]
